title: TeacherRoutingDataset
description: Schema for the teacher-generated routing dataset containing prompt embeddings, noise levels, routing labels, and velocity vectors derived from DanceOPD teacher inference.

source_dataset.description: The source dataset from which the sample was drawn.

prompt_embedding.description: The text embedding vector for the prompt.

noise_level.description: The noise level used during the diffusion step.

routing_label.description: The expert field ID selected by the teacher model.

velocity_vector.description: The velocity vector generated by the selected expert field.

excluded.description: Indicates if this sample was excluded due to undefined routing.
